aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request

partnercentral:Catalog.description: Filters access by a specific Catalog

partnercentral:ChannelHandshakeType.description: Filters access by channel handshake types

partnercentral:FulfillmentTypes.description: Filters access by benefit fulfillment types

partnercentral:RelatedEntityType.description: Filters access by entity types for Opportunity association

partnercentral:VerificationType.description: Filters access by the type of verification being performed
